attr.title: Ratcheteer DX
attr.desc: From the creator of MinUI, explore the interconnected caverns below the frozen surface and a vast Snowcean above as you set out to rescue friend, foe, and stranger alike in this lo-fi action-adventure!
attr.inst: Download the demo with `download_depot 3908650 3908653 2932770551190015228` and add to the data folder, and if you enjoy the demo purchase the full game and add its data instead! Full game latest manifest can be copied here: https://steamdb.info/depot/3166153/manifests/
